programme.title: Dance Moms: Episode
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: (PG) Highlighting Abby's past and her deepest fears for the future as she faces the harsh reality of going to prison; Abby discusses her past mistakes.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.sub-title: Season Special - The Return of Abby
programme.desc: (PG) Abby endures the physical and emotional struggles of undergoing chemotherapy, while pushing to keep her dream of a new competitive dance team for the ALDC alive.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.
